title: Khaled Al-Marri & Partners promotes Soham Kumar to Junior Partner
description: Khaled Al-Marri & Partners has announced the promotion of Soham Kumar to the position of Junior Partner.Kumar has been associated with the firm for over 2 years, during which he has worked closely with the partners across dispute resolution and advisory mandates involving both regional and international clients.
